name: wolves hunting
short: The wolves smell the blood of their prey
desc: For the enemy's destroyers and frigates deployed in battle, they cause damage + %s / %s / %s / %s based on the deployment point (every 8dp is a level), damage to the ship's weapons and engines + %s / %s / %s / %s, its power grid performance + %s / %s / %s / %s, and it takes damage - %s / %s / %s / %s.

name: Defeat the enemy with a sharp knife
short: They look fragile, but they can always carve fatal gaps in solid walls.
desc: For our destroyers and frigates deployed in battle, the deployment cost is - %s, and the power grid performance + %s; if they are special mobile weapons, the deployment cost is - %s, and the power grid performance + %s.
source: Knight's Guards - Small Ship Combat Textbook

name: The front is dull
short: Without the Legion, what do we have left?
desc: The maximum {CR} of all ships in the fleet is -{%s}, but each fleet friendly to the player within {%s} unit distance will provide negative relief to the player's fleet for {%s} days, during which the negative effects will be reduced by {%s}
